title: Antenna radome and electronic device including the same
abstract: The disclosure relates to a pre-5th-Generation (5G) or 5G communication system to be provided for supporting higher data rates Beyond 4th-Generation (4G) communication system such as Long Term Evolution (LTE). According to embodiments of the present disclosure, an electronic device may include: a printed circuit board (PCB); an antenna; a radome; and a coupling structure, the antenna may be disposed to be positioned at a first height from a first surface of the PCB, the coupling structure may be physically connected with the radome, and the coupling structure may be disposed to have a second height lower than or equal to the first height, with respect to the first surface of the PCB.
claims: 1. An antenna module comprising: a printed circuit board (PCB); an antenna including at least a first corner and a second corner opposite to the first corner; a dielectric configured for covering at least the antenna; and a plurality of coupling structures connected with the dielectric, wherein the plurality of coupling structures includes a first coupling structure adjacent to the first corner and a second coupling structure adjacent to the second corner configured for adjusting a frequency of signals radiated by the antenna, wherein the antenna is disposed at a first height from a first surface of the PCB, and wherein the plurality of coupling structures are disposed at a second height lower than or equal to the first height, from the first surface of the PCB.
